title: abronia fragrans
intro: Abronia fragrans, also known as the fragrant desert lavender, is a shrub-like plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from its essential oils. The health benefits of Abronia fragrans include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and aiding in the treatment of wounds and skin irritations. Abronia fragrans is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, salves, and infusions, and can also be used as a natural insect repellent.
